title: osmanthus sinensis
intro: Osmanthus sinensis, also known as sweet osmanthus or fragrant tea olive, is a flowering plant native to China, belonging to the Osmanthus genus of the olive family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Osmanthus sinensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from digestive issues, as well as having anti-aging properties. Osmanthus sinensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used as a fragrance and flavoring agent in perfumes and desserts.
